nasb.text: As you did not obey the Lord and did not execute His fierce wrath on Amalek, so the Lord has done this thing to you this day.

esv.text: Because you did not obey the voice of the Lord and did not carry out his fierce wrath against Amalek, therefore the Lord has done this thing to you this day.

cnv.text: 因為你沒有聽從耶和華的話，沒有執行他對亞瑪力人所懷的烈怒，所以今天耶和華向你行了這樣的事，

ccb.text: 耶和华今天这样对待你，是因为你没有听从祂的吩咐，没有把祂憎恶的亚玛力人灭绝。
